description: A coastal landscape depicting tall chalky cliffs rising from a grey-green sea under an overcast sky. The cliffs extend from the right side of the composition, their faces showing layers of pale stone with patches of green vegetation clinging to the slopes. Rocks and boulders are scattered along the shoreline at the base of the cliffs. The sea is rendered in muted grey-green tones with subtle wave action. The overall palette is subdued and atmospheric, suggesting damp, misty conditions.
